instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect excessive torque converter slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger a fault when slip exceeds Slip_Limit.

expected_output: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up when excessive slip occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall unlock torque converter clutch when slip exceeds Critical_Slip.

expected_output: IF TCC_Slip > Critical_Slip THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
